'''鈭歝h-p-h''' ('''kachapah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wurship|wurship]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wurship|wurship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-p-h
|-
! Lemma
| kachapah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichapah|thichapah]] || [[word:jichapah|jichapah]] || [[word:shichapah|shichapah]] || [[word:kichapah|kichapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchapah|thuthuchapah]] || [[word:jujuchapah|jujuchapah]] || [[word:shushuchapah|shushuchapah]] || [[word:kukuchapah|kukuchapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchapah|thuchapah]] || [[word:juchapah|juchapah]] || [[word:shuchapah|shuchapah]] || [[word:kuchapah|kuchapah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchapah|thuchapah]] || [[word:juchapah|juchapah]] || [[word:shuchapah|shuchapah]] || [[word:kuchapah|kuchapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechapah|thechapah]] || [[word:jechapah|jechapah]] || [[word:shechapah|shechapah]] || [[word:kechapah|kechapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothochapah|thothochapah]] || [[word:jojochapah|jojochapah]] || [[word:shoshochapah|shoshochapah]] || [[word:kokochapah|kokochapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochapah|thochapah]] || [[word:jochapah|jochapah]] || [[word:shochapah|shochapah]] || [[word:kochapah|kochapah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochapah|thochapah]] || [[word:jochapah|jochapah]] || [[word:shochapah|shochapah]] || [[word:kochapah|kochapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chapah|th忙chapah]] || [[word:j忙chapah|j忙chapah]] || [[word:sh忙chapah|sh忙chapah]] || [[word:k忙chapah|k忙chapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachapah|thathachapah]] || [[word:jajachapah|jajachapah]] || [[word:shashachapah|shashachapah]] || [[word:kakachapah|kakachapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachapah|thachapah]] || [[word:jachapah|jachapah]] || [[word:shachapah|shachapah]] || [[word:kachapah|kachapah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachapah|thachapah]] || [[word:jachapah|jachapah]] || [[word:shachapah|shachapah]] || [[word:kachapah|kachapah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shachapah|shachapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshachapah|goshachapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishachapah|gokishachapah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shachapahn眉|shachapahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshachapahnkn眉|goshachapahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishachapahn眉|gokishachapahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shachapahsh毛|shachapahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshachapahnksh毛|goshachapahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishachapahsh毛|gokishachapahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachapahro|shachapahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachapahnkro|goshachapahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachapahro|gokishachapahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shachapahmu|shachapahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachapahnkmu|goshachapahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachapahmu|gokishachapahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shachapahsher|shachapahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshachapahnksher|goshachapahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishachapahsher|gokishachapahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shachapahng|shachapahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshachapahnkng|goshachapahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishachapahng|gokishachapahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shachapahya|shachapahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshachapahnkya|goshachapahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishachapahya|gokishachapahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shachapahyam|shachapahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshachapahnkyam|goshachapahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishachapahyam|gokishachapahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachapahn眉sh毛|shachapahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachapahnkn眉sh毛|goshachapahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachapahn眉sh毛|gokishachapahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachapahn眉ro|shachapahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachapahnkn眉ro|goshachapahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachapahn眉ro|gokishachapahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachapahn眉mu|shachapahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachapahnkn眉mu|goshachapahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachapahn眉mu|gokishachapahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachapahsh毛n眉|shachapahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachapahnksh毛n眉|goshachapahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachapahsh毛n眉|gokishachapahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachapahsh毛ro|shachapahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachapahnksh毛ro|goshachapahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachapahsh毛ro|gokishachapahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachapahsh毛mu|shachapahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachapahnksh毛mu|goshachapahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachapahsh毛mu|gokishachapahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachapahron眉|shachapahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachapahnkron眉|goshachapahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachapahron眉|gokishachapahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachapahrosh毛|shachapahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachapahnkrosh毛|goshachapahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachapahrosh毛|gokishachapahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shachapahromu|shachapahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshachapahnkromu|goshachapahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishachapahromu|gokishachapahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shachapahmun眉|shachapahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshachapahnkmun眉|goshachapahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishachapahmun眉|gokishachapahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shachapahmush毛|shachapahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshachapahnkmush毛|goshachapahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishachapahmush毛|gokishachapahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shachapahmuro|shachapahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshachapahnkmuro|goshachapahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishachapahmuro|gokishachapahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
